mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.real_name AS worker_name, z.zone_name FROM farm_record r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.worker_id = u.id LEFT JOIN farm_zone z ON r.zone_id = z.id WHERE r.zone_id = #{zoneId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.*, u.real_name AS worker_name, z.zone_name FROM farm_record r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.worker_id = u.id LEFT JOIN farm_zone z ON r.zone_id = z.id WHERE r.zone_id = #{zoneId} AND r.audit_status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.*, u.real_name AS worker_name, z.zone_name FROM farm_record r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.worker_id = u.id LEFT JOIN farm_zone z ON r.zone_id = z.id WHERE r.worker_id = #{workerId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT r.*, u.real_name AS worker_name FROM farm_record r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.worker_id = u.id WHERE r.zone_id = #{zoneId} AND r.task_id = #{taskId}
SELECT r.*, u.real_name AS worker_name, z.zone_name FROM farm_record r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.worker_id = u.id LEFT JOIN farm_zone z ON r.zone_id = z.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO farm_record(task_id, zone_id, worker_id, record_type, content, images, audit_status) VALUES(#{taskId}, #{zoneId}, #{workerId}, #{recordType}, #{content}, #{images}, #{auditStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE farm_record SET audit_status = #{auditStatus}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason} WHERE id = #{id}
